name: powerbi-analyst-mcp
description: Query and analyse Power BI semantic models with Claude. Explore tables and measures, run DAX queries, and work with real results — even across datasets with tens of thousands of rows.

client_id.title: Azure Application (Client) ID
client_id.description: The Application (client) ID from your Azure AD app registration. Find this in Azure portal → App registrations → Overview.

tenant_id.title: Azure Directory (Tenant) ID
tenant_id.description: Your Azure AD Directory (tenant) ID. Find this in Azure portal → Azure Active Directory → Overview.

output_dir.title: Output Directory (optional)
output_dir.description: Directory where large DAX query results are saved as CSV files. Leave blank to use the default: ~/powerbi_output.

tools.name: authenticate
tools.description: Sign in via OAuth device code flow

tools.name: list_workspaces
tools.description: List all Power BI workspaces you have access to

tools.name: list_datasets
tools.description: List datasets / semantic models in a workspace

tools.name: get_dataset_info
tools.description: Metadata and refresh history for a dataset

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: All visible tables in a dataset

tools.name: list_measures
tools.description: Measures with name, table, description, and format string

tools.name: list_columns
tools.description: Columns with data type and key flag

tools.name: execute_dax
tools.description: Run a DAX query — inline for small results, local CSV for large ones

tools.name: read_query_result
tools.description: Page through a saved CSV result file

tools.name: delete_query_log_entry
tools.description: Remove an entry from query history
